briefdescription.para: Vm_ is input variable from compartment, used for most rates.
Channel actual conductance depending on opening of gates.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends out the messages expected of a channel, after process. Used as a utility by various derived classes.
Utility function for a common computation using local variables
Assign the local Vm_ to the incoming Vm from the compartment
Ik is read-only for MOOSE, but we provide the set func for derived classes to update it.

briefdescription.para: Specify the Class Info static variable for initialization.

detaileddescription.para: The ChanCommon.g handles the data fields for all ion channel classes in MOOSE, when they are using regular ee calculations rather than being zombified by the solver.
